name: Tetrazini Magnifico- Jeanne Elledge
recipeInstructions:
1. COOK NOODLES AS DIRECTED.
2. DRAIN.
3. COMBINE ALL INGREDIENTS, EXCEPT 1/4 CUP PARMESAN CHEESE, in a large mixing bowl. BLEND WELL.
4. TURN INTO A LARGE COVERED CASSEROLE DISH.
5. SPRINKLE REMAINING PARMESAN OVER TOP.
6. COVER.
7. BAKE AT 350 DEGREES FOR ONE HOUR.
8. SERVE WITH CRUSTY FRENCH BREAD & LEAFY GREEN SALAD.
